CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2011 Continued To Nov-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Gmt Bonanza Corporation, Only.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. HELD, #2857.

Laila Louridas, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First Republic Bank, a Division of Bank of America, N.A., a National Bank.
Plaintiff's Witness: Virginia Adams was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant .
Default was entered against defendant: GMT Bonanza Corp. dba Realty World Bonanzaon.
Matter is stayed against Co-Defendant Gina Tchikovani pending Bankruptcy Proceeding.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $150,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $18,177.65
Late fees $690.96
Attorney's Fees - $7,000.00.
Costs - $1,471.10, for a total judgment in the amount of $177,339.71

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Gmt Bonanza Corporation, Only.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
